one_time_items.description: Non-recurring expenses including employee severance and legal expenses associated with litigation and certain legal and advisory expenses associated with purchase termination or patent protection
Non-cash expenses associated with discontinued products, including depreciation and inventory obsolescence

evidence_phrases: We are pleased to deliver first quarter results that were in line with our expectations, driven by broad based demand in both our datacenter and CATV businesses
strong customer engagement around our 800G transceivers and 1.6 Tb products
fourth consecutive quarter of record revenue in Q1
qualitative_signals.ceo_quote_primary: We are pleased to deliver first quarter results that were in line with our expectations, driven by broad based demand in both our datacenter and CATV businesses. We continue to see strong customer engagement around our 800G transceivers and 1.6 Tb products, particularly as AI-driven datacenter investments accelerate.
qualitative_signals.cfo_quote_primary: We generated our fourth consecutive quarter of record revenue in Q1. We continued to make progress on increasing our production capacity in both our U.S. and Taiwan locations, exiting Q1 with total manufacturing capacity of nearly 100,000 units of 800G transceivers per month.

ambiguous_items.explanation: Computed: (151.1 - 99.9) / 99.9 * 100 = 51.3%. Not explicitly stated as percentage in document.
Computed: (151.1 - 134.3) / 134.3 * 100 = 12.5%. Not explicitly stated as percentage in document.
